future_allowed_write_scope.allowed_change: Add TDX_SERVICE_STATE_KEY and get_tdx_service_dependency(request: Request); update installer internals to use the named state key; preserve get_tdx_service fallback.
Convert exactly five /api/v1/tdx route dependencies from Depends(get_tdx_service) to Depends(get_tdx_service_dependency), preserving route behavior and OpenAPI.
Add focused provider install, app-state override, fallback, and route dependency override coverage.
Record future implementation evidence and verification results.
Bind the implementation PR to the authorized source/test/report paths.

forbidden_future_scope: change real TDX adapter connection behavior
change route paths, HTTP methods, response models, response envelopes, auth, exception behavior, or OpenAPI exposure
change docs/API, generated clients, frontend, PM2 scripts, runtime config, OpenSpec changes/specs, or GitHub issue labels
future_required_gates: GitNexus context/impact for get_tdx_service, install_tdx_service, and file-path-qualified tdx.py route symbols
TDD failing focused tests for provider install/app-state override/fallback and at least one route dependency override path
text guard: tdx.py route body direct get_tdx_service calls remain 0 and Depends(get_tdx_service) becomes 0
ruff check and black --check on touched backend source/test files
app.main import and targeted OpenAPI smoke: paths=500, duplicate operation IDs=0, seven TDX paths remain present
staged GitNexus detect_changes before future commit

gitnexus_spot_checks.note: Graph sees installer fallback; route Depends edges require source/OpenAPI matrix.
Name is ambiguous in impact lookup; context resolved the tdx.py route symbol.
Name is ambiguous in impact lookup; context resolved the tdx.py route symbol.

decision.reason: A future dedicated provider can align /api/v1/tdx with the established app-state dependency pattern while preserving get_tdx_service as compatibility fallback for installer/dashboard consumers.
